extraction.one_line_summary: MARTIN Dan soloed to victory from 19-rider break after attacking 10km out on Sega di Ala, while BERNAL cracked for first time losing 1:23 to YATES.
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange valley pacing nearly caught 19-rider break despite 5:30 gap, questioning traditional mountain stage break calculus.
Martin attacked final climb at 10km not summit, exploiting early acceleration advantage over chasers on 14km ascent.
Bernal's bad back caused first GC crack at 123 seconds, Martinez pacing unable to prevent Yates gaining minute.
Almeida outclimbed Yates by 17 seconds chasing Martin, signaling sunny-day form superiority over stage-race positioning.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: First visible weakness with bad back, lost 1:23 despite Martinez pacing support on Sega di Ala
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Gained nearly minute on Bernal to move back onto podium at 3:23, suggesting pink jersey vulnerability
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: positive: Chased Martin harder than Yates, finishing 17 seconds ahead, jumped back into top 10 on summit finish
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: 10km solo effort from 19-rider break shows recovered form after losing time previous days
rider_signals.VLASSOV Aleksandr: negative: Distanced on Paso San Valentino, dropped to 4th at 6:03, showing Summit weakness
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: Major trouble on climbs, fell from 4th to 6th at 6:09, lost over three minutes
